section_order: Hero > Features (3-4) > Social Proof > Pricing > FAQ > Footer CTA
cta_placement: Above fold primary + after social proof secondary + footer sticky
color_strategy: Primary gradient hero > white features > light gray social proof > white pricing
effects: Fade-in on scroll + hover lift on feature cards + smooth scroll nav
conversion_tips: Hero headline under 10 words + single primary CTA above fold + benefit-driven subhead

section_order: Hero (problem) > Pain Points > Solution Demo > Features > Testimonials > CTA

conversion_tips: Lead with the pain point + show the transformation + use before/after

section_order: Hero (transformation) > Before State > After State > How It Works > Results > CTA
cta_placement: After transformation visual + after results + sticky bottom

conversion_tips: Show real results with numbers + use client transformation stories

section_order: Hero > Logo Bar > Testimonials > Case Studies > Stats > Features > CTA
